The daily average temperature at Troyes-Barberey in late October (Oct 26) typically averages around 9.5°C, while late January (Jan 24) historically averages around 3.5°C. Using a normal distribution for daily mean temperatures with a typical standard deviation of ~4.5°C in winter and ~4.0°C in autumn, the difference (Jan - Oct) has a mean of -6.0°C and a standard deviation of roughly 6.0°C. Calculating the Z-score (-1.0) yields an approximate probability of 16% that the January date will be warmer. Allowing for typical climatic trends, an estimate of 14% is appropriate.
